user.name: Romain Claret
user.bio: CS PhD Student focusing on Artificial General Intelligence, interested Machine Reasoning, Meta-Learning, Graphs, Symbolics, NLProc and Knowledge Representation

node.name: lfs-7.8
node.description: Set of Shell scripts to automate Linux from Scratch, based on the book 7.8

node.name: mse.thesis.code
node.description: Components to build open-domain question-answering chatbots which handle conversational contexts and generate natural language sentences as answers. Uses Wikidata to build sub-knowledge graphs and maintain conversational context. Master's Thesis at Master of Engineering (MSE), Switzerland

node.name: msc.ct.project
node.description: Tools to extract information from multiple swiss Covid datasets with the goal of finding and showing explicitly what we are looking for, e.g., trying to find the correlations between the new Covid cases and the Vaccination, based on datasets provided by the Swiss Government. - Project - Computational Thinking at University of Neuchâtel, Switzerland

node.name: OverClouds
node.description: Browser-based service for an anonymous and decentralized internet. Uses webrtc and webtorrent to distribute the data. Initially a BSc thesis.

node.name: bsc.p3
node.description: Emergency Calls Dispatcher. Responds simultaneously to emergency center calls to dispatch to the right services based on the conversation context.

node.name: mse.wem.project
node.description: Recommendation system for Arxiv papers using machine learning. Fetching and calculating similarities using an LDA model and Neo4j. Building a ranking based on the 2 results. - Semester Project - Web Mining at Master of Engineering (MSE), Switzerland
